title: Future forms review
explanation:
Future forms review

Use will for predictions and spontaneous decisions, going to for plans and evidence, present continuous for arranged future events, and present simple for timetables.

questions.text: Look at those clouds! It [*is going to rain|will rain|rains] soon.
I think people [*will work|are working|work] fewer hours in the future.
We [*are meeting|meet|will meet] the clients at 10 tomorrow.
I forgot my wallet. I [*will go|am going to go|go] back for it.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: She ____ to Berlin next Friday. Everything is booked. | *is flying | flies | will fly
I am sure you ____ the exam. | *will pass | are passing | pass
We ____ a new flat this summer. | *are going to buy | buy | will buying
The lesson ____ at half past nine. | *starts | is starting | will starts
They [*are going to open|will opening|open] a new branch next year.
I am thirsty. I [*will get|am getting|get] some water.
The conference [*begins|is going to begin|will beginning] on Monday.
What time [*are you leaving|do you leave|will you leaves] tomorrow?
He [*is not going to stay|will not staying|does not stay] in that job for long.
questions.feedback: Decision or intention about the future.
